title: Sprint category in "my Work"

posts.author: manonD (manon )
posts.cookedHtml:
In the tab ranks by epics we have « Sprints » colomn witch is a connexion colonm who extract tasks and connect it with sprint.

Capture d’écran du 2024-10-01 09-16-461913×560 93.3 KB

In “my work” there is no category about “sprint” category. So we can’t organize our work with sprint vue or rank by it.

Capture d’écran du 2024-10-01 09-17-081897×515 90.7 KB
